positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized abstract celestial flora design. Featuring intricate bioluminescent geometric vines winding around stylized moons and stars, forming a central, elegant mandala pattern. The composition must be contained within a perfect circle, designed to be viewed as a repeat, seamless patch or single central graphic. Minimalist, high contrast, vector aesthetic, clean lines, perfect symmetry, print-on-demand merchandise art, digital illustration.
